name: Gaint Run Color Switch
description: Which Color are you? What about NOW? Get ready for Color Switch an addictive and visually stunning gaming experience with Color Switch! This mobile game challenges you to navigate through obstacles by matching your characters color with the color of the obstacles. Color Switch is a challenging and addictive game that will test your reflexes and problem-solving skills. In this game, you must navigate your character through a series of obstacles by matching your characters color with the color of the obstacles. It sounds easy, but its harder than it looks!
instructions: Hold the left mouse button and drag for left or right
